free_text: -LOW LYING ENERGY LEVELS IN GA-70 AND GA-72 EXCITED IN
.GAMMA RAYS DETECTED WITH GE(LI) PAIR SPECTROMETER.
CM3 AND NAI CRYSTALS AS PAIR SPECTROMETER ARRANGEMENT.
.DETAILED DESCRIPTION IS GIVEN IN ARNELL ET AL,
CALCULATED USING NATURAL NICKEL TARGET. NI INTENSITIES
.ASSUMING A NICKEL CROSS SECTION OF 4.6 B, ABSOLUTE
INTENSITIES OF GA-70,GA-72 LINES WERE CALCULATED USING
INTENSITY VALUE I=6.1 PERCENT FOR 7814 KEV NI LINE.
.ERRORS IN THE ABSOLUTE INTENSITY ARE ESTIMATED TO
ABOUT 20 PERCENT FOR STRONG HIGH ENERGY LINES AND
INCREASE SUCCESSIVELY UP TO ABOUT 100 PERCENT FOR
WEAK LINES AND MANY OF LINES IN LOW ENERGY REGION.
PROBABLY DUE TO GA-69(N,N G) REACTION.
LINE MAY BE DUE TO DECAY OF GA-70 TO GE-70.
PROBABLY DUE TO GA-71(N,N G) REACTION,
LINE MAY BE DUE TO DECAY OF GA-72 TO GE-72.
